% check a.php
a.php:4:13: cannot assign 'void' to $x
a.php:11:13: class member `Repo::notExist` does not exist

-- a.php --
<?php

$repo = new Repo;
$x = $repo->get();

$x->foo;
$x->bar;
$x->name;
$x->baz;

$x = $repo->notExist->doesNotExistEither();
-- d.php --
<?php

class Repo
{
	public function get()
	{
	}
}
